videos.title: The ultimate guide for Loot, the Pathfinder [digital or paper!]
videos.description:
This Red/Green/Blue Temur Loot, the Pathfinder Commander deck is also legal in Brawl on MTG Arena. In this complete deck guide, CovertgoBlue shows viewers the differences between the two popular formats and how to win with this new commander in both.

Decklist - https://moxfield.com/decks/ZAS_Ig9g206pzb2po5NdxA
